titleStmt.title: SII 28.285: original edition by J. Sundaram
No. 285. (A.R. No. 439 of 1913.) ĀṞAGAḶŪR, ATTUR TALUK, SALEM DISTRICT.

summary.p: Kāmēśvara temple, second prākāra, south wall.

p.hi: Tribhuvanachakravartti Sundara-pāṇḍya Year 1[8], Mēsham śu. 15 (Pūrṇṇami), Thursday, Svāti -1289 A.D., April 7 (?)
p.note: The year has been read doubtfully as 12 in the Annual Report. It looks more like 18. On this basis assuming that the Sundara-pāṇḍya of this record is identical with JaTAvarman Sundara-paṇḍya whose accession we calculated to have been 1271 A.D., The equivalant has been given as above. (Swamikannu Pillai, L.D., on some new dates of Pāṇḍya kings in the 13th century A.D., Ind. Ant., Vol. XLII 1913), p. 221-223). It is seen that the king could also have been the JaTAvarman Sundara-pāṇḍya II whose initial year is stated to be 1302 A.D., as the above details of date also equate with 1319 A.D., April 5, f.d.n. ·29 (cf A.R. Ep., 1913-14 p. 65).

summary.p: The beginning of the first twelve lines of this inscription has been lost.

It records the sale of the rights of worship on 3-1/8 days (in each month) along with appertaining rights and privileges to Tiruñānasambanda-paṇḍitar, for 50 paṇam, equal to 25,000 chōḻiya-kāśu by the śivabrāhmaṇas of the temple of [Tirukkāmīśvaram]-uḍaiya-nāyaṉār. These 3-(1/8) days worship had fallen to the lot of the śivabrāhmaṇas consequent on the establishment of the guilt of stealing an ornament belonging to the temple, by a lady, who and whose relatives held the right of worship for these 3-(1/8) days and which were ordered by the templeauthorities to be confiscated and assigned to the rest of the right holders who were asked to pay the price of 250 paṇam for the same. The latter could not find the required money and that is why the rights for these many days were now sold as stated above as the amount realised had to be paid to the temple.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
ṉa tribhuvaṉaccakravattikaḷ śrīcuntarapāṇṭiya tevaṟku yāṇṭu 18āvatu meṣanāyaṟṟu pūrvvapakṣattu pūrṇṇaiyum viyāḻakkiḻamai peṟṟa coti nāḷ malāṭākiya jaṉaṉāta vaḷanāṭṭu Āṟṟūr kūṟṟattu
ṭaya nāyaṉār koyiṟkāṇi Uṭaiya civabrāhmaṇar bhāradvājaṉ Āṇṭāṉ taṉavācikāṭṭiṉa paṭṭaṉum Ivan tampi Ūruṭaiya perumāḷāna paṉmāheśvarapaṭṭaṉum Inta gotrattu nāyaṉ tāti Āṟaināyakapaṭṭaṉum Ivan tampi
gotra teppamaḻakiyāṉ marutapaṭṭanum kāśyapaṉ tirukkaḻippālai pukaliyum Āvaṇakāmaṉ viratamuṭittapaṭṭaṉum Inta gotrattu tāḻikaṇṭa māttāṇṭa brahmārāyaṉum Inta gotrattu Uṭaiyān ceyya cevaka paṭṭaṉ Aṇṇāmalai
poṉ parappināṉ Aivaṟkku Ariyāṉ Aracapaṭṭaṉum Ivvaṉaivom koyil kāṇivilai prāmāṇam paṇṇikkuṭutta paricāvatu Ikkoyil śaivācāryyakkāṇi Uṭaiya deśikaṉ bhāradvājan Āṭkoṇṭa tevaṉ
nta paṇṭitaṟku nāṅkaḷ viṟṟukkuṭutta kāṇiyāvatu Ikkoyil muppatu vaṭṭattu kāṇi Uṭaiya nāṅkaḷum Ā[pyāya]ṉ Umaiyaṉ bhāri tevāṇṭāṭ cāṉi Uḷḷiṭṭārum koyil muṟai ceytu potukiṟa nāḷiley Innāyaṉār tiruvāparaṇaṅkaḷile ko
Ivvūr nilaṅkalanta māheśvararum nāyaṉār mutalikaḷum tirumaṇṭapattile Iruntu keṭṭa Iṭattu Ittiruvāparaṇaccoṟṟi tevāṇṭācāṉi Uḷḷiṭṭār pakkale kaḷavāka nirappi Ivaḷaiyum Ivaḷ marumāmakaḷaiyum ciṟaiyile vaittu Itukku teṇṭamāka Ivaḷ kāṇiyum Ivaḷ Uḷḷiṭṭār kāṇiyum
viṟṟu tiruppaṇi ceyvateṉṟu nāyaṉār Aruḷic ceykaiyil Ivaḷ kāṇiyāṉa nāḷ 2(1/2)yum Ivaḷ koṇṭuṭaiya nāḷ (1/2) 1 Araikkālm Āka nāḷ 3 1 Araikkālḷukkum vilai niccayitta paṇam Ippaṇam 2 100 5 10tukku Ivaḷ nāḷum Ivar Uḷḷiṭṭār nāḷum
vateṉṟu nalivu ceykaiyil Eṅkaḷukku Uṟpatti Illāmaiyil Ivaḷ Uḷḷiṭṭār nāḷ 3 1 Araikkāllum muppatu vaṭṭattil viḻukkāṭṭile nāṅkaḷ vicikkoṇṭu Eṅkaḷukku kramāgatamāy nāṅkaḷ Aṉupavittu potukiṟa nāḷkaḷiley
ku viṟṟukkuṭutta nāḷāvatu Āṟakaḷuruṭaiyār tirukkāmiśvaramuṭaiya nāyaṉār koyil Aṭiyāka koṇṭu Ivvūr palataḷi Uḷḷiṭṭa nāyaṉmār koyilkaḷilum Āṟṟūrum Āṟṟūr nāṭṭil Ūrkaḷilum pala taḷi Uḷḷiṭṭār nāyaṉmār koyilkaḷilum
ṟūr koyilkaḷilum maṟṟum Epperpaṭṭa prāptikaḷilum Eṅkaḷ kāṇiyāṉa nāṭkaḷile tiruñānacampanta paṇṭitaṟku viṟṟu kuṭutta nāḷkaḷāvatu taṉavāci kāṭṭiṉa paṭṭar Uḷḷuṭṭār nāḷ mukkāl 4lum Āṟaināyakapaṭṭaṉ Uḷḷuṭṭār nāḷ mukkāl � 1muntiriyum
māttāṇṭa brahmāraāyaṉ nāḷ kha� 1muntiriyum viratamuṭitta paṭṭanāḷ � 1muntiriyum ceyya cevakapaṭṭaṉ Uḷḷuṭṭār nāḷ (1/4) mukkāṇi 1muntiri yum Āravacapaṭṭa nāḷ (1/4) � 1muntiri yum Āka 3�vācalukku nāḷ 3 100 2 10 4 Inta nāḷ 3 Araikkāl lukku varum maṉaiyum maṉai prāptikaḷum piṭiyppiṭivāriyum
ṉa varuvaṉavum varaviruntanavum maṟṟum Eppeṟpaṭṭa Urimai prāptikaḷum bhāgyaśriyaṅkaḷum Iṟṟai nāḷāl Ivaṟku viṟṟuk koḷvatāna Emmilicainta vilaipporuḷ Aṉṟāṭu naṟpaṇam 2 100 5 10 Ippaṇam 2 100 5 10tukkum Anṟāṭu vilaippaṭi kācu paṇam Oṉṟukku
coḻiya kācu 100 Āka paṇam 2 100 5 10kku kācu 2 10000 5 1000 Ikkācu Irupattaiyyāyirattukkum paṇam 2 100 5 10me vilaiyāvatākavum Ituve poruḷ māvaṟutip poruḷ celavolai Āvutākavum Ippaṭi viḻukkāṭṭāka vanta nāḷ
2 100 5 10m Āvaṇakkaḷḷiye kāṭṭeṟṟi kiḻiccelavaṟakkaik koṇṭu viṟṟu vilai pramāṇam paṇṇi kalveṭṭik kuṭuttom muppatu vaṭṭattu kāṇi Uṭaiya civabrāhmaṇarom Orukālāvatum Irukālāvatum mukkālavatum
vilaikkaṟa viṟṟu poruḷaṟak kaikkoṇṭu tiruppaṇiyile Oṭukki celavaṟṟapaṭikku kalveṭṭik kuṭuttom muppatu vaṭṭattu kāṇi Uṭaiya civabrāhmaṇarom Ittiruñānacampanta paṇṭitaṟku Ippaṭi kalluveṭṭuvittuk kuṭuttom
muppatu vaṭṭattu kāṇi Uṭaiya Ivvaṉaivom .
Digital edition of SII 28.285 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
